seoTitle: Clare vs Claremont Meadows — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clare and Claremont Meadows. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clare vs Claremont Meadows: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clare and Claremont Meadows.
heading: Clare vs Claremont Meadows — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clare, New South Wales and Claremont Meadows, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Claremont Meadows has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Clare (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clare or Claremont Meadows safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clare has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Claremont Meadows scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clare scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Claremont Meadows scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clare or Claremont Meadows?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Claremont Meadows has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
